failures.error_message: iNova repository is not accessible in this cloud execution environment. git clone via HTTPS failed (403). git proxy at 127.0.0.1:44797 returned 502 'Proxy error: repository not authorized' for RSA-Data-Solutions/iNova. GitHub MCP tools restricted to rsa-data-solutions/always-on-engineering-fleet only. No SSH keys present. No tests could run.

notes: RECURRING (day 25): env_problem — iNova repo unreachable in cloud session for 25 consecutive days (2026-05-20 through 2026-06-13). Root cause: git proxy and GitHub MCP both scoped to always-on-engineering-fleet only. ACTION REQUIRED: add RSA-Data-Solutions/iNova to the session's GitHub MCP repo scope, OR provision a read-only deploy key / INOVA_READ_PAT secret, OR add iNova to the session's git proxy allowlist.
